title: post-eco-market-auth-register
description: Test user registration with valid and already-registered email to verify account creation and validation error handling.

title: post-eco-market-auth-login
description: Test user login with valid and invalid credentials to verify token issuance and authentication failure response.

title: post-eco-market-auth-refresh
description: Test access token refresh with valid and invalid/expired refresh tokens to verify token renewal and error handling.

title: put-eco-market-auth-update
description: Test account profile update with valid access token and without token to verify successful update and unauthorized access handling.

title: get-eco-market-products-featured
description: Test retrieval of featured products without authentication to verify public access and correct product list response.

title: post-eco-market-products
description: Test product listing creation with valid seller token and invalid body to verify successful creation and validation error handling.

title: patch-eco-market-products-productid-status
description: Test product status update with valid admin token and non-admin token to verify moderation functionality and access control.

title: post-eco-market-orders
description: Test order creation using real product data and correct payload shape (`sellerId`, `products[]`, `shippingMethod`, `paymentMethod`). First verify success path returns 201 for valid quantity. Then trigger a business-rule violation by submitting quantity greater than available stock for the same real product and expect HTTP 400 with error/message (do not use fake productId because that should return 404).

title: get-eco-market-cart
description: Test retrieval of user's cart with valid token and without token to verify authorized access and unauthorized error response.

title: post-eco-market-sellers-register
description: Test seller registration request submission with valid user token and without token to verify request creation and unauthorized access handling.

title: post-eco-market-auth-forgot-password
description: Test forgot-password endpoint with valid email and malformed payload to verify reset flow trigger and validation behavior.

title: post-eco-market-auth-reset-password
description: Test password reset endpoint with invalid token and invalid password payload to verify secure token validation and error responses.

title: get-eco-market-orders-my-orders
description: Test my-orders retrieval with and without access token to verify authenticated access control and response contract.

title: get-eco-market-chat-conversations
description: Test chat conversation list endpoint with and without token to verify auth enforcement and data retrieval shape.

title: get-eco-market-notifications
description: Test notification listing endpoint for authenticated user and unauthenticated request to verify access control and response behavior.
